title: But what exactly are world models?
summary: Julia Turc explores the definition and implementations of world models, covering two main schools of thought: generative and predictive approaches. The video examines three primary application categories: synthetic data generation, interactive environments, and autonomous agents, with examples from NVIDIA, Meta, Wayve, Google, and World Labs.
